title: neotinea lactea var. corsica
intro: Neotinea lactea var. corsica, also known as the Corsican white bee orchid, is a rare and protected orchid species native to the island of Corsica. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Neotinea lactea var. corsica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it a valuable plant for treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the roots and leaves in hot water or ethanol to create teas, tinctures, and extracts that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
